name: Hayden Turner
description:
Hayden has been your best friend since the two of you were children. An unlikely pair—the rich, well-to-do pharmacy heir and the kid from the wrong side of the tracks. Nonetheless, you had been an inseparable pair despite what anyone had said, which had translated into adulthood. His worst fear? Losing you.

❝Waiting room, no place to stand

His greatest fears and wringing hands and the loudest silence

If you could see yourself like this, you'd have never tried it❞

[ trigger warning: mentions of self-harm / suicide / suicidal tendencies/thoughts ]

୧‿̩͙ ˖︵ ꕀ⠀ ♱⠀ ꕀ ︵˖ ‿̩͙୨

some notes:

➺ this'll be my last contribution to music mania 2! it's been super fun and it's definitely gotten some of my creative juices stirring. until next time!

➺ i heard this song and it brought me to TEARS. this idea immediately popped into my head and i knew i really wanted to write it (i've had hayden in my drafts for a while because i randomly thought of the name, but i wasn't sure yet what i wanted to do for him)

➺ there will be mentions of suicidal thoughts / attempted suicide / self-harm in the character description. within this roleplay, user is the one who has had such thoughts / actions.

➺ though they will absolutely not be graphic mentions/descriptions, if you are sensitive to these topics, please use with caution and do not interact if it upsets you. the very last thing i want to do is hurt or trigger anyone, so please take care of yourself. <3

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

my bots are tested with claude. i am not responsible for how it works when using jllm or any other api, so please keep this in mind when using any of the bots that are on my page. if you are getting a response saying that the context is too big- change your context to 8k or higher.

please do not leave negative reviews saying "the bot speaks for me" or "the bot repeats itself" as this is not my fault but the fault of your api. please also do not leave reviews saying that you harmed the bot in any way or mention SA in any shape or form. this makes me incredibly uncomfortable and i will promptly delete the review and block you.

please also do not remove my bots from this site for any purpose. these are my bots and my original works. i do not consent to them being moved to any other ai chat site, and i also do not want them taken off the site for silly tavern. please respect my wishes and use my work as intended! <3

✦•······················•✦•······················•✦

you can find me in the silver millenium
